[{"Name":"M Bouls","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjdQKcju2u_vEBlaLWlvBjAKjYq6FJySCaiHyWVkM4_y8Yrg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Although the new windows themselves are good, the whole process was atrocious. Would never deal with NNE again.

1- When one of the old wood trims broke during install (understandable), they changed the trim to a new white casing. They however left the old brown trim on the adjoining window, which didn’t match and looked awful. Although my partner was home, he was never consulted, nor asked for a walk through prior to the crew leaving.

2 - We paid for the windows with the condition that the casing be replaced and that they finish the exterior caulking on a 2-foot section they missed. They replied requesting $250 to return to site, then ignored our calls and emails for weeks. Finally they agreed to fix the work as if they were doing us a favor.

3- Weeks later we were no-showed twice for the scheduled repairs, having taken time off work for nothing. Upon the 3rd attempt, the work was finally complete, leaving multiple scratches and grease stains on our walls, well outside the working area.

4- We sent a final email with pictures, voicing our frustration with their lack of professionalism, communication and customer service in hopes of getting some sort of apology. Instead of offering any form of compensation for our troubles, they replied with this:
“It has become increasingly clear that, regardless of the work performed, you were seeking post-completion discounts or compensation from the start. We do not and will not entertain such tactics. We fulfilled our contractual obligations in full and have shown good faith beyond what was required. Any further accusations or attempts to dispute payment or workmanship are completely unwarranted and will not be tolerated. We have already gone above and beyond and this matter is now closed.”

Utterly disappointed in the business.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPIx1IJGxGi5RzEiATF_Q8&fid=0x0:0x9e69f044e80ad373"],"When":"2025-7-31"},{"Name":"Julie Bedard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqYyBJE3QFAXPKJ-4_zn-wL2MH_eUKEqKRittZ7xZWdg0Cn0KK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We just had two doors and a few windows installed last week.  We are pleased with the end result.  Claude and Brody were the installers and they were very pleasant, cleaned up any messes well and the work they did looked well done.  Mike and the office staff were very pleasant as well.  One thing very small issue that arose was the timing.  When scheduling the install we scheduled for one day which in fact it was definitely a two day job.  I did not know this until last minute, so I feel that the office, when booking days with their clients, should stipulate how many days the installers will be required to be there.  This was a minor issue and ended up working itself out in the end.  Overall, we would not hesitate to go to them again.   Invoice #3678

Krissy \u0026 Derek","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICP8I79dQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x1b7931405facd74e"],"When":"2024-11-21"},{"Name":"Lisa Brankley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFlgwyauBiNpbyXQd6Q2dxyc3OHffUlV_p5PiN7S0tkK-iNa55=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would truly recommend Old Hickory Buildings! We ordered a 10x20 lofted barn to serve as storage space in our backyard. The seller in North Bay provided honest, prompt and thoughtful customer service and we used the online tool to build our own custom shed, which was very intuitive.  The result was fantastic - exactly as expected based on that tool! It was also lovely to be able to peruse available models online and on their North Bay and/or Mattawa lots in advance, to a get a sense of the size, materials, colours, etc. The guidelines on how to prepare for delivery of the shed were extremely clear and helpful, and Old Hickory delivered on every expectation and deadline.  (A lovely bonus was following their online building schedule which allows customer to monitor progress on their build!) Michael our seller and Colin who made the delivery were consistent and prompt in their communication whether to make arrangements or answer questions, and they helped us feel confident in our decisions and in the placement of the shed itself. It’s a beautiful build and we appreciate that we were able to create something specific to our property, intended use and esthetic!!! Thank you Old Hickory!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr_LHzCw\u0026fid=0x0:0x1b7931405facd74e"],"When":"2024-7-5"},{"Name":"C Brian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWqr2R4bGHDIS_vXQivTSLzdjlyDaPftpDih4pDohFDrMc4A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Buyer beware. [{"Name":"Pantherena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2vQgk7v8xkfgkaSFhhV_EwwZn8-5gykeIY8aU-jAvFIGjYMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am new to North Bay.  I use a wheelchair to get around town, and have tried to shop at several hardware stores, although they boasted wheel-chair accessibility, they were not.  The aisles were too narrow and there was so many products stacked at the end of each aisle, that I couldn't maneuver without knocking things down.  This store however IS ACTUALLY wheel-chair accessible.  I was able to go down the aisles and access the complete store without hindrance.  It was so clean and uncluttered. The staff were friendly and helpful. They suggested the proper hardware for my project.  The salesman even gave me the instruction and courage to complete the project myself.  Kudos to this store and staff.  It is where I will go from now on, for all my hardware needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patricia Tabachnick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdxPnabZQTKmKWCvdfwMpBRMcfwCEGP078ZpomGX2jeF2jQWtT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I'm not sure why, but the Memorial Dr. location has poor customer service, while the other location has good customer service. They just ignore you or act like you're bothering them if you ask for something. I'm guessing all the grumpy staff are put to work at the Memorial Dr. store.

Edit: Recently returned to this store to buy a few odds and ends and staff were much more friendly this time, so I'm happy things are better. Adding a star to original review.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcFRyz3Cw5gtv-oup64Thcmd3eOdPyEBpRvlOJFaTqC7QAAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I have a similar experience to the person who was made to feel stupid or a waste of time. This was at the Memorial Drive location, and I stopped to ask questions of the two people who were at the counter near the back. One barely could pull his eyes off whatever he was looking at on the counter in front of him to address me. The other one just stood and smirked when he thought I wasn't looking. Both were middle-aged. I walked out and went to another store.

Now that was over a year ago and I hadn't gone back since. This past month I did go back (shortly before the top-soil sale on Saturday, and again on that Saturday to buy what I needed), and this time the staff were helpful, friendly. They were young staff, one of whom was working the register, the other one working the yards but who had come inside when I talked to him. Another older fellow was also helpful as he took me back out into the yards to show me what they had for gravel and top soils. I felt treated well and with respect and friendly courtesy. Well done to Rona.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caleb Jolkowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOFr1URcSvp3lS5u7J8e5hQcOR7iNxU3xZZBJ5eD1IEVzD3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Don't like to leave negative reviews for places but the online ordering experience for this location was absolutely horrendous. Ordered products online on Friday and received an email saying the order would be ready in a few hours. The next day after hearing nothing, received an email saying it would be ready by Monday. Then on Monday morning received an email saying it would not be ready until the following Monday. This is ridiculous  emas Theall we had ordered was 8 2x4's. The email stated to contact the store to get a refund and cancel the order. Called into the store and was rudely told "we probably don't have your item in stock, you have to do all that refund stuff online." So why did the online system take our money and state it was in stock and would be ready in a few hours? Absolutely terrible handling of the situation and will never order from here again. Had no problems with my online order at home depot in Huntsville that I placed on the same day, and was able to pick up on the same day.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cathy Ruggles Boucher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVt9CqV3VKBrGTJhAYXSjfopBchohDCdX8AqX4nlxG-JcQDlE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have found Mike, Steve and Dale very helpful at the Memorial Drive Rona. We bought an entry way door from Rona and Dale spent at least an hour with us helping us choose the style and colour. He made calls to his suppliers, when necessary and was very humble when I thanked him for his help and patience. I feel like I made a friend and will definitely shop at Rona again. We love our new door and have had compliments on it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Derrick W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-d94pStiIUpiKYfQT6lz8kznuM6AYT3ugfE60pEUF88wkRg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don't think I've ever spent money here before.  I've been here twice and both times I was made to feel stupid.  Staff aren't supposed to talk down to customers.  Many people have very little knowledge of what I do for a living and I don't talk down to them, so I don't know why me not knowing anything about what they are experts in makes them better than me.  I was literally ready to spend about $1500 there and two staff members just talked down to me and didn't even give me the time of day, because I think they believed I was wasting their time.  They actually walked away from me so I left the store and bought what I needed from somewhere else.  I know I look young, but I'm in my mid-30's and own my own house.  I think they thought I was young and not worth their time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steven Foisy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCCRnB3KWAM8pSVHs99TIV_khfcTnjx6X-bVXs7xlX2tW7RA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Staff  being the contractor counter wasn't very nice talking down to the costumer, making rude comments.Laughing out of no where. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Glen Cameron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpNHEBbx9rF1dh04ZI9_pG5NkCJxjfNRptsSzSqyDoNs-f64B_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Purchased a Corning Wear baking  dish that scratched way too easy on the first use.  Christmas present of course.  Drove in on boxing day to return the poor quality item.  Was refused because they didn't want to do returns that day.  There were no customers in the store (I was there when they opened) and 4 staff just standing at the cash doing nothing. They said they were only open today to make money and balance the books, not to look after returns.  They say it had been posted for 2 weeks.   When you don't expect to have to return something, you don't take notice of a small sign.  No one mentioned it when I  spent my hard earned money .  So they really don't have a good customer care policy in my opinion.   Sell sell sell and don't help return poor quality items until it is convenient for them.  If there had been a lineup then I would understand, but there wasn't!   Once I return this item, I will probably not return and I will tell anyone that is interested of my opinion.   I will say the employee was polite but the owner put a policy in place that should be serving his customers but only wants to make money.  I am pissed off due to this!\n\nFollow up- I returned the next day and all is good. I did apologize for my side of things and we had a nice and productive conversation.   The return was handled professionally and courteously.  I still think the owners policy for that day could have been better.   Suggestions were made to make it easier for their customers without affecting their bottom line.  I hope the future policies are affected appropriately.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt McIntosh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJd8LQFJpaIYfD6tsz3vD6080YwrYwO6-9DORlM_13QgeUoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a weird problem with a busted key and they did not hesitate with trying to help me out. [{"Name":"Margot Carnahan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJhgyWEeMucRtDUffncUABLGFd-U5Nd5Pvk1CkYmXhWDcDTA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you to everyone at Thermo Coustics for a job well done.  The  expertise and professionalism was impressive.   The sales, technical, and administrative staff worked seamlessly together to complete our attic and garage insulation project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDHbAPJnViCviMNQt86886mm_FbO41eLNLvHXx0dYl4sy1t98=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an excellent experience with Thermo Coustics. Although blown-in insulation is not (currently) listed on their website as one of their services, I can assure you that they do offer it and that they do it very well.
I had originally toyed with the idea of doing the job myself but ultimately decided that it was best to leave this to the professionals. They were honest about the job requirements and associated costs, and they came in significantly less expensive then the competitors.
It's easy to understand why this company has been around for a very long time: excellent customer service, fair pricing, and quality work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kim Boudreault","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIl939W4rxiuiMUQM7INYjWKNH6Ze8XkO5vi5WgEog73lJECQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had Thermo do our kitchen and dining room renovations.
Drywall, floors, ceilings, appliance installation and electrical.  This Co. is so professional.   Going through renovations can be stressful, but they made it easy.  They completed the job on-time,  consulted us along the way and kept us apprised as progress and decisions were required. They did excellent work and our place looks amazing.  In addition to the professional and quality service, the big bonus was coming home to a clean work site every night.  We felt very confident during the entire process and highly recommend Thermo Coustics to deliver stress free quality services for a reasonable price.   Thank you Thermo Coustics.  We are so happy with the results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cheryl Ranger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKCF1GRUfhdWsoBs9kIKGlpn8rjqbUsgmgKzThmJ6sLTwg7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thermo Coustics completed a renovation of our kitchen and dining area removing asbestos and re-insulating, replacing  a wall with a hidden beam to reconfigure the space, window replacement, and new flooring throughout preparing for a new kitchen by the Brownstone. Pat was very professional and coordinated all the trades involved and the project was completed on time and on budget.  We are extremely pleased with the final results and would not hesitate to recommend Thermo Coustics.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Kelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWCJAyjanKFuZjy51URKikUfN7F27Z9bsLJUB1Pi-3kr8mxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Thermo Coustics spray foam our entire house and they did a fantastic job. They were very dedicated to ensure the Job site was clean and free from any overspray.

The crew onsite was great to deal with and I was very impressed on how Tony and Jeff protected all the windows, doors and electrical receptacles.

I would recommend Thermo Coustics to anyone looking for professional work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Felske","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtkedQ_lvUUuoLUosBIC077Dcve1bnKuji2TkU7Dunx5AXTKkH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my attic insulation blown in by Thermo Coustics. They topped my current R12 to R60 rating and i couldn't be happier! Patrick came by and was super nice and straight forwarder. He was very professional in his recommendations for what we needed. On the day of installation the installers (Jeff) laid mats down to protect our floors, setup booths to keep the insulation contained. They worked all day and stayed late to finish my house in 1 day when I was quoted a 2 day job. They let me go up and look at the work and was SUPER impressed with the care and detail they put into the job.
I would 100% suggest you give Patrick a call if you are looking for any insulation job. You wont regret it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amanda Horn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-AhYQR3GIbFWeqSMRwvPrEI1expBHSaI_CQzaYMkobXWEhw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thermocoustics did a renovation in my home to add spray foam insulation to the shared wall of my semi-detached house. The work was conducted in the attic, second floor, and the main floor. It was quite an extensive retrofit. They were extremely professional, did excellent work, were on time every day, knowledgeable, friendly, and left no mess behind. I highly recommend them. Patrick was my point of contact from quotation to job completion. He was extremely knowledgeable, made a commitment that was obtainable, and a pleasure to work with. I am thrilled that this work was completed in the time promised and within the quote that was provided. Thank you all for your work on this project. I won't hesitate to use you again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deborah Sykes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGK4TtwD68MJg9ef9I71w4C8EBWuwNlvYZjPNGeMv7K3iGdCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just used Thermo Coustics for the 2nd time in 3 years. We were so pleased after the first experience that we contracted them again to spray foam 2 rooms in our cottage (previous session was installing spray foam around the perimeter of the crawlspace) as we undergo renovations on a 50+yr old structure.
When they came yesterday to do the 2nd job, I was surprised and pleased the same 2 fellas who came the first time we're still working for them. I thought Thermo Coustics must be doing something right to keep these 2 hardworking employees this long, and believe me the crew we had does indeed work hard. They are also polite,  thoughtful, respectful, extremely hardworking and cleaned up afterwards to the extent they were vacuuming outside my back door on the granite rock corraling the little blue bits that were trying to escape.

My husband I would highly recommend this company to anyone looking to have spray foam insulation done,  and by the way, after the first job of having the crawlspace done, there was a huge difference in how warm the area was the following 2 winters than what it was like prior.  The product they install is fantastic and I can't toot their horn enough. Thermo Coustics has a loyal customer in us as we continue our room by room renovations.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Alex Shand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISdRW7a9eLMfIuU4VdGNqB684-5cuCPkL5GKUbcPA8IXb4Bg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Never ever ever will I get delivery from the Home Depot again. I scheduled for a stove delivery and they just didn’t show up the first time, no warnings. I asked if they could please just deliver to the store and they made it impossible to change the delivery. They said it would take longer etc. I warned the delivery service they use that I don’t think they’d be able to make it to my house as we live up a very steep hill. They insisted on still delivering it to our house. I get the call from the delivery driver today saying “sorry we can not make it up your hill” …..\nI called so many people and begged everyone please to just bring it to the store and they wouldn’t allow it. Awful awful ordeal to be dealing with. Never again. We’ve been out of a stove for a few weeks and made this such a problem. What’s the point of delivery if you have to meet them at the bottom of your road just to bring it inside yourself any-ways????","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Parks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocId9pngVVSo0dYBgtfNQxUHmE3kcaWhFBWo0Q5UPPmbn-caoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Do not buy appliances from Home Depot. Electrolux has not been able to repair the fridge. title: Nipissing Serenity Hospice
address: 799 John St, North Bay, ON P1B 8T2
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kas G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJR826Ef-jXQAF3Ls-7zkdBSa2HPlEwgNYNIziKB_-LOygrog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Your thoughtful care, came with dignity and respect. Although it has taken me close to a year to write this review after the passing of my mother in law, I know it’s important to give flowers when they are deserved🩷 the entire team at the hospice made the experience gentle, calm, and natural, as weird as that could sound with death.

Not knowing what to expect our family was scared, worried, and I’m sure we all felt very out of place.

The hospice became our home away from home for the few weeks we were there daily. Not to mention navigating having our newborn by our side while we would visit- the team always ensured that our family had what we needed during the process, and not just materialistic things ither- they held the emotional space, and kindness for our family. When our mother in law did pass- the team stood along the edge of the halls, and there was a moment of peace and silence.

They truly made the most difficult moment of my life, the most gentle experience that it could have been comparing to having to deal with such a tragedy in a hospital or home setting. I couldn’t imagine the dedication you all have to your work, and I’m sure I’m speaking for thousands of individuals in our community when I said - Thank you, for all that you do.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amanda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuVQI5C1gdGVx7Qsv64eFbWOGzASeQ5FlHyW9b1MdaXW3jzTSx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's never easy to lose someone, let alone the heart of the family; Grandma. My Grandma chose to spend her last months at the Hospice and it was such a nice way to be able to spend time with her. She was very well taken care of, you don't have that hospital feeling when you are there, the staff is so lovely, caring, gentle and truly are there because they care. If I am lucky enough to option to chose this Hospice when my time comes, I wouldn't hesitate one bit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jakki Baumhour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCYZqR5RbcRvtAUQN1Ti9YG7yNl75p1M5yh4nT3cjBo-CjgB4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t thank Nipissing Serenity Hospice enough for the exceptional care they provided to my dad during his final days. The compassion and professionalism displayed by everyone there truly made a world of difference for our family.

A special shoutout goes to RPN Megan. Your kindness, patience, and dedication were nothing short of extraordinary. Also, a heartfelt apology for my two brothers, Troy and Mark, who, in their grief, seemed to think they were auditioning for a reality dating show. Megan, you’re going to make a great RN!

Dad couldn’t be home as he wanted in his final days, but Serenity Hospice was an amazing alternative. I highly recommend.

The family of Mark Clarke.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cindy Bonany","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCdPr7flJJMOIrw9T_-MVUWwCxoagfWN-tuseNHj5IJ_AMHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an absolutely wonderful place. Because of the outstanding amd compassion of the nurses and staff of the hospice, my father died with dignity and grace. And it just wasn't my Dad that was cared for -- the compassion and understanding from the nurses and staff extended to my mother and I as well making our journey with my Dad a little less difficult. Words cannot express our heartfelt thanks for everything you did for us. Truly, a peaceful, remarkable journey.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Curtis Kingsbury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbgSswyXUuvjvVQ53WWDiZ8-ZWroJ0fbGmgGVCS_V5R85GVg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The entire staff are nothing short of incredible.
